nasb.text: Marriage is to be held in honor among all, and the marriage bed is to be undefiled; for fornicators and adulterers God will judge.

esv.text: Let marriage be held in honor among all, and let the marriage bed be undefiled, for God will judge the sexually immoral and adulterous.

cnv.text: 人人都應該尊重婚姻，婚床也不要玷污，因為　神一定審判淫亂的和姦淫的人。

ccb.text: 人人都要尊重婚姻，不可玷污夫妻关系，因为上帝必审判淫乱和通奸的人。

csbs.text: 婚姻当受所有人尊重，床也不可玷污，因为神将要审判淫乱和通奸的人。
